  <script>
    const $=id=>document.getElementById(id),roleHeaderName="X-Cilly-Role",readOnlyHeaders={[roleHeaderName]:"read_only"},operatorHeaders={[roleHeaderName]:"operator"};
    const status=$("analysis-status"),err=$("analysis-error"),empty=$("analysis-result-empty"),content=$("analysis-result-content"),resultStatus=$("analysis-result-status"),signalBody=$("analysis-signal-list"),runtimeStateStatus=$("runtime-state-status"),runtimeStateValue=$("runtime-state-value"),runtimeModeValue=$("runtime-mode-value"),runtimeIdValue=$("runtime-id-value"),runtimeOwnerValue=$("runtime-owner-value"),strategyStatus=$("strategy-status"),strategyList=$("strategy-list"),signalStatus=$("signal-status"),signalList=$("signal-list"),alertStatus=$("alert-status"),alertEmpty=$("alert-empty"),alertList=$("alert-list"),journalStatus=$("journal-status"),journalList=$("journal-artifact-list"),artifactStatus=$("artifact-content-status"),artifactPreview=$("artifact-content-preview"),traceStatus=$("decision-trace-status"),traceList=$("decision-trace-list"),lifeStatus=$("lifecycle-status"),lifeOrders=$("lifecycle-order-list"),lifeTimeline=$("lifecycle-event-timeline"),lifeSelected=$("lifecycle-selected-order"),runButton=$("run-analysis-button"),watchlistStatus=$("watchlist-status"),watchlistError=$("watchlist-error"),watchlistSelect=$("watchlist-select"),watchlistList=$("watchlist-list"),watchlistEmpty=$("watchlist-empty"),watchlistSelectionStatus=$("watchlist-selection-status"),watchlistExecutionStatus=$("watchlist-execution-status"),watchlistExecutionError=$("watchlist-execution-error"),watchlistResultEmpty=$("watchlist-result-empty"),watchlistResultContent=$("watchlist-result-content"),watchlistRankedResultList=$("watchlist-ranked-result-list"),watchlistFailureList=$("watchlist-failure-list"),watchlistRankedStatus=$("watchlist-ranked-status"),watchlistFailureStatus=$("watchlist-failure-status"),watchlistExecuteButton=$("watchlist-execute-button");let selectedKey="",activeWatchlistId="";
    const row=cells=>{const tr=document.createElement("tr");cells.forEach(v=>{const td=document.createElement("td");td.textContent=v;tr.appendChild(td)});return tr},formatScore=v=>typeof v==="number"?v.toFixed(2):"-",parseSymbols=raw=>raw.split(/[\n,]/).map(v=>v.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    const showError=message=>{err.hidden=!message;err.textContent=message||""},showWatchlistError=message=>{watchlistError.hidden=!message;watchlistError.textContent=message||""},showWatchlistExecutionError=message=>{watchlistExecutionError.hidden=!message;watchlistExecutionError.textContent=message||""};
    function setWatchlistForm(item){$("watchlist-id").value=item?item.watchlist_id||"":"";$("watchlist-name").value=item?item.name||"":"";$("watchlist-symbols").value=item?(item.symbols||[]).join(", "):""}
    function setActiveWatchlist(item){activeWatchlistId=item&&item.watchlist_id?item.watchlist_id:"";watchlistSelect.value=activeWatchlistId;setWatchlistForm(item);watchlistSelectionStatus.textContent=activeWatchlistId?`Selected persisted watchlist ${activeWatchlistId}.`:"No watchlist selected.";Array.from(watchlistList.children).forEach(entry=>entry.classList.toggle("selected-row",entry.dataset.watchlistId===activeWatchlistId))}
    function renderWatchlists(items){watchlistSelect.innerHTML="";watchlistList.innerHTML="";if(!Array.isArray(items)||!items.length){const option=document.createElement("option");option.value="";option.textContent="No watchlists available";watchlistSelect.appendChild(option);watchlistEmpty.hidden=false;watchlistList.hidden=true;setActiveWatchlist(null);return}items.forEach(item=>{const option=document.createElement("option");option.value=item.watchlist_id;option.textContent=`${item.name} (${item.watchlist_id})`;watchlistSelect.appendChild(option);const entry=document.createElement("li");entry.dataset.watchlistId=item.watchlist_id;entry.style.cursor="pointer";entry.innerHTML=`<strong>${item.name}</strong><br /><span class="muted">${item.watchlist_id}</span><br /><span class="muted">${(item.symbols||[]).join(", ")}</span>`;entry.addEventListener("click",()=>setActiveWatchlist(item));watchlistList.appendChild(entry)});watchlistEmpty.hidden=true;watchlistList.hidden=false;setActiveWatchlist(items.find(item=>item.watchlist_id===activeWatchlistId)||items[0])}
    const renderResult=payload=>{["analysis-run-id","analysis-ingestion-run-id","analysis-symbol","analysis-strategy"].forEach((id,i)=>$(id).textContent=[payload.analysis_run_id,payload.ingestion_run_id,payload.symbol,payload.strategy][i]||"-");signalBody.innerHTML="";const signals=Array.isArray(payload.signals)?payload.signals:[];if(!signals.length){resultStatus.textContent="No signals returned."}else{signals.forEach(item=>signalBody.appendChild(row([item.symbol||payload.symbol||"",item.strategy||"",item.direction||"-",item.stage||"-",formatScore(item.score),item.timestamp||"-"])));resultStatus.textContent=`Loaded ${signals.length} signals from analysis run ${payload.analysis_run_id}.`}empty.hidden=true;content.hidden=false};
    const renderWatchlistExecutionResult=payload=>{$("watchlist-analysis-run-id").textContent=payload.analysis_run_id||"-";$("watchlist-result-name").textContent=payload.watchlist_name||payload.watchlist_id||"-";$("watchlist-result-ingestion-run-id").textContent=payload.ingestion_run_id||"-";$("watchlist-result-market-type").textContent=payload.market_type||"-";watchlistRankedResultList.innerHTML="";const ranked=Array.isArray(payload.ranked_results)?payload.ranked_results:[];if(!ranked.length){watchlistRankedStatus.textContent="No ranked watchlist results returned."}else{ranked.forEach(item=>watchlistRankedResultList.appendChild(row([String(item.rank||""),item.symbol||"",formatScore(item.score),formatScore(item.signal_strength),String(Array.isArray(item.setups)?item.setups.length:0)])));watchlistRankedStatus.textContent=`Loaded ${ranked.length} ranked watchlist results from analysis run ${payload.analysis_run_id}.`}watchlistFailureList.innerHTML="";const failures=Array.isArray(payload.failures)?payload.failures:[];if(!failures.length){watchlistFailureStatus.textContent="No execution failures reported."}else{failures.forEach(item=>watchlistFailureList.appendChild(row([item.symbol||"",item.code||"",item.detail||""])));watchlistFailureStatus.textContent=`Execution reported ${failures.length} isolated symbol failures.`}watchlistResultEmpty.hidden=true;watchlistResultContent.hidden=false};
    async function loadRuntimeState(){runtimeStateStatus.textContent="Loading runtime state from /system/state...";try{const response=await fetch("/system/state",{headers:readOnlyHeaders});if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);const payload=await response.json(),runtime=payload.runtime||{},ownership=runtime.ownership||{};runtimeStateValue.textContent=payload.status||"-";runtimeModeValue.textContent=runtime.mode||"-";runtimeIdValue.textContent=runtime.runtime_id||"-";runtimeOwnerValue.textContent=ownership.owner_tag||"-";runtimeStateStatus.textContent=`Runtime state loaded from ${payload.metadata&&payload.metadata.source?payload.metadata.source:"system state"}.`}catch(error){runtimeStateValue.textContent="-";runtimeModeValue.textContent="-";runtimeIdValue.textContent="-";runtimeOwnerValue.textContent="-";runtimeStateStatus.textContent=`Failed to load runtime state: ${error.message}`}}
    async function loadWatchlists(){watchlistStatus.textContent="Loading watchlists from /watchlists...";try{const response=await fetch("/watchlists",{headers:readOnlyHeaders});if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);const payload=await response.json(),items=Array.isArray(payload.items)?payload.items:[];renderWatchlists(items);watchlistStatus.textContent=`Loaded ${items.length} persisted watchlists from /watchlists.`}catch(error){renderWatchlists([]);watchlistStatus.textContent=`Failed to load watchlists: ${error.message}`}}
    $("analysis-form").addEventListener("submit",async event=>{event.preventDefault();showError("");const ingestion_run_id=$("manual-analysis-ingestion-run-id").value.trim(),symbol=$("manual-analysis-symbol").value.trim(),strategy=$("manual-analysis-strategy").value.trim(),market_type=$("manual-analysis-market-type").value,lookback_days=Number.parseInt($("manual-analysis-lookback-days").value,10);if(!ingestion_run_id)return showError("Ingestion Run ID is required.");if(!symbol)return showError("Symbol is required.");if(!strategy)return showError("Strategy is required.");if(Number.isNaN(lookback_days)||lookback_days<30||lookback_days>1000)return showError("Lookback Days must be between 30 and 1000.");runButton.disabled=true;status.textContent="Submitting runtime analysis request...";try{const response=await fetch("/analysis/run",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",[roleHeaderName]:operatorHeaders[roleHeaderName]},body:JSON.stringify({ingestion_run_id,symbol,strategy,market_type,lookback_days})});if(!response.ok){let message="Analysis request failed.";try{const payload=await response.json();if(payload.detail)message=typeof payload.detail==="string"?payload.detail:JSON.stringify(payload.detail);else if(payload.error)message=payload.error}catch{}throw new Error(message)}const payload=await response.json();renderResult(payload);status.textContent=`Analysis run ${payload.analysis_run_id} completed.`;void loadSignals();void loadRuntimeState()}catch(error){showError(error instanceof Error?error.message:"Analysis request failed.");status.textContent="Analysis request failed."}finally{runButton.disabled=false}});
    async function mutateWatchlist(method,path,payload){showWatchlistError("");const response=await fetch(path,{method,headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",[roleHeaderName]:operatorHeaders[roleHeaderName]},body:payload?JSON.stringify(payload):undefined});if(!response.ok){let message=`Watchlist request failed with HTTP ${response.status}.`;try{const responsePayload=await response.json();if(responsePayload.detail)message=typeof responsePayload.detail==="string"?responsePayload.detail:JSON.stringify(responsePayload.detail)}catch{}throw new Error(message)}return response.status===204?null:response.json()}
    $("watchlist-create-button").addEventListener("click",async()=>{const watchlist_id=$("watchlist-id").value.trim(),name=$("watchlist-name").value.trim(),symbols=parseSymbols($("watchlist-symbols").value);if(!watchlist_id)return showWatchlistError("Watchlist ID is required.");if(!name)return showWatchlistError("Watchlist name is required.");if(!symbols.length)return showWatchlistError("At least one symbol is required.");watchlistStatus.textContent=`Creating watchlist ${watchlist_id} via /watchlists...`;try{const payload=await mutateWatchlist("POST","/watchlists",{watchlist_id,name,symbols});activeWatchlistId=payload.watchlist_id;watchlistStatus.textContent=`Watchlist ${payload.watchlist_id} created.`;await loadWatchlists()}catch(error){showWatchlistError(error instanceof Error?error.message:"Watchlist create failed.");watchlistStatus.textContent="Watchlist create failed."}});
    $("watchlist-update-button").addEventListener("click",async()=>{const watchlist_id=$("watchlist-id").value.trim()||activeWatchlistId,name=$("watchlist-name").value.trim(),symbols=parseSymbols($("watchlist-symbols").value);if(!watchlist_id)return showWatchlistError("Select a watchlist to update.");if(!name)return showWatchlistError("Watchlist name is required.");if(!symbols.length)return showWatchlistError("At least one symbol is required.");watchlistStatus.textContent=`Updating watchlist ${watchlist_id} via /watchlists/${watchlist_id}...`;try{const payload=await mutateWatchlist("PUT",`/watchlists/${encodeURIComponent(watchlist_id)}`,{name,symbols});activeWatchlistId=payload.watchlist_id;watchlistStatus.textContent=`Watchlist ${payload.watchlist_id} updated.`;await loadWatchlists()}catch(error){showWatchlistError(error instanceof Error?error.message:"Watchlist update failed.");watchlistStatus.textContent="Watchlist update failed."}});
    $("watchlist-delete-button").addEventListener("click",async()=>{const watchlist_id=$("watchlist-id").value.trim()||activeWatchlistId;if(!watchlist_id)return showWatchlistError("Select a watchlist to delete.");watchlistStatus.textContent=`Deleting watchlist ${watchlist_id} via /watchlists/${watchlist_id}...`;try{await mutateWatchlist("DELETE",`/watchlists/${encodeURIComponent(watchlist_id)}`);activeWatchlistId="";setWatchlistForm(null);watchlistStatus.textContent=`Watchlist ${watchlist_id} deleted.`;await loadWatchlists()}catch(error){showWatchlistError(error instanceof Error?error.message:"Watchlist delete failed.");watchlistStatus.textContent="Watchlist delete failed."}});
    $("watchlist-refresh-button").addEventListener("click",()=>{showWatchlistError("");void loadWatchlists()});
    watchlistSelect.addEventListener("change",async event=>{const watchlist_id=event.target.value;if(!watchlist_id)return setActiveWatchlist(null);watchlistSelectionStatus.textContent=`Loading watchlist ${watchlist_id} from /watchlists/${watchlist_id}...`;try{const response=await fetch(`/watchlists/${encodeURIComponent(watchlist_id)}`,{headers:readOnlyHeaders});if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);setActiveWatchlist(await response.json())}catch(error){showWatchlistError(error instanceof Error?error.message:"Watchlist load failed.");watchlistSelectionStatus.textContent="Watchlist load failed."}});
    $("watchlist-execute-form").addEventListener("submit",async event=>{event.preventDefault();showWatchlistExecutionError("");const watchlist_id=activeWatchlistId||$("watchlist-id").value.trim(),ingestion_run_id=$("watchlist-execution-ingestion-run-id").value.trim(),market_type=$("watchlist-execution-market-type").value,lookback_days=Number.parseInt($("watchlist-execution-lookback-days").value,10),min_score=Number.parseFloat($("watchlist-execution-min-score").value);if(!watchlist_id)return showWatchlistExecutionError("Select a watchlist before execution.");if(!ingestion_run_id)return showWatchlistExecutionError("Ingestion Run ID is required.");if(Number.isNaN(lookback_days)||lookback_days<30||lookback_days>1000)return showWatchlistExecutionError("Lookback Days must be between 30 and 1000.");if(Number.isNaN(min_score)||min_score<0||min_score>100)return showWatchlistExecutionError("Min Score must be between 0 and 100.");watchlistExecuteButton.disabled=true;watchlistExecutionStatus.textContent=`Executing watchlist ${watchlist_id} via /watchlists/${watchlist_id}/execute...`;try{const response=await fetch(`/watchlists/${encodeURIComponent(watchlist_id)}/execute`,{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",[roleHeaderName]:operatorHeaders[roleHeaderName]},body:JSON.stringify({ingestion_run_id,market_type,lookback_days,min_score})});if(!response.ok){let message="Watchlist execution failed.";try{const payload=await response.json();if(payload.detail)message=typeof payload.detail==="string"?payload.detail:JSON.stringify(payload.detail)}catch{}throw new Error(message)}const payload=await response.json();renderWatchlistExecutionResult(payload);watchlistExecutionStatus.textContent=`Watchlist execution ${payload.analysis_run_id} completed.`;void loadSignals()}catch(error){showWatchlistExecutionError(error instanceof Error?error.message:"Watchlist execution failed.");watchlistExecutionStatus.textContent="Watchlist execution failed."}finally{watchlistExecuteButton.disabled=false}});
    async function loadStrategies(){strategyStatus.textContent="Loading strategy list from /strategies...";try{const response=await fetch("/strategies");if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);const payload=await response.json();strategyList.innerHTML="";if(!payload.items||!payload.items.length){strategyStatus.textContent="No strategies available.";return}payload.items.forEach(item=>strategyList.appendChild(row([item.strategy||"",item.display_name||"",(item.default_config_keys||[]).join(", ")])));strategyStatus.textContent=`Loaded ${payload.total} strategies.`}catch(error){strategyStatus.textContent=`Failed to load strategies: ${error.message}`}}
    async function loadSignals(){signalStatus.textContent="Loading latest signals from /signals...";try{const response=await fetch("/signals?limit=20&sort=created_at_desc");if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);const payload=await response.json();signalList.innerHTML="";if(!payload.items||!payload.items.length){signalStatus.textContent="No signals found.";return}payload.items.forEach(item=>signalList.appendChild(row([item.created_at||"",item.symbol||"",item.strategy||"",item.direction||"",item.score!=null?String(item.score):"",item.stage||""])));signalStatus.textContent=`Showing ${payload.items.length} of ${payload.total} signals.`}catch(error){signalStatus.textContent=`Failed to load signals: ${error.message}`}}
    async function loadAlerts(){alertStatus.textContent="Loading alert history from /alerts/history...";alertEmpty.hidden=true;try{const response=await fetch("/alerts/history?limit=10&offset=0",{headers:readOnlyHeaders});if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);const payload=await response.json();alertList.innerHTML="";const items=Array.isArray(payload.items)?payload.items:[];if(!items.length){alertStatus.textContent="No recent alert events found.";alertEmpty.hidden=false;return}items.forEach(item=>alertList.appendChild(row([item.occurred_at||"",item.severity||"",item.event_type||"",item.symbol||"-",item.source_type||"-"])));alertStatus.textContent=`Showing ${items.length} of ${payload.total} alerts.`;alertEmpty.hidden=true}catch(error){alertStatus.textContent=`Failed to load alert history: ${error.message}`;alertEmpty.hidden=false;alertEmpty.textContent="Unable to load alerts."}}
    const summarize=entry=>({step:entry.step||entry.phase||entry.name||"",reason:entry.reason||entry.decision||""}),preview=(type,content)=>type==="json"?JSON.stringify(content,null,2):String(content||"");
    async function loadArtifact(runId,artifactName){artifactStatus.textContent=`Loading ${artifactName}...`;artifactPreview.textContent="";try{const response=await fetch(`/journal/artifacts/${encodeURIComponent(runId)}/${encodeURIComponent(artifactName)}`);if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);const payload=await response.json();artifactPreview.textContent=preview(payload.content_type,payload.content);artifactStatus.textContent=`Loaded ${payload.artifact_name} for run ${payload.run_id}.`}catch(error){artifactStatus.textContent=`Failed to load artifact content: ${error.message}`}}
    async function loadTrace(runId,artifactName){traceStatus.textContent="Loading decision trace entries...";traceList.innerHTML="";try{const query=`run_id=${encodeURIComponent(runId)}&artifact_name=${encodeURIComponent(artifactName)}`,response=await fetch(`/journal/decision-trace?${query}`);if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);const payload=await response.json(),entries=payload.entries||[];if(!entries.length){traceStatus.textContent="No decision trace entries found for selected artifact.";return}entries.forEach((entry,index)=>{const s=summarize(entry||{});traceList.appendChild(row([String(index+1),s.step,s.reason,JSON.stringify(entry)]))});traceStatus.textContent=`Loaded ${payload.total_entries} decision trace entries.`}catch(error){traceStatus.textContent=`Failed to load decision trace: ${error.message}`}}
    async function loadJournal(){journalStatus.textContent="Loading journal artifacts from /journal/artifacts...";journalList.innerHTML="";try{const response=await fetch("/journal/artifacts?limit=50");if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);const payload=await response.json(),items=payload.items||[];if(!items.length){journalStatus.textContent="No journal artifacts found.";artifactStatus.textContent="No artifacts available.";traceStatus.textContent="No artifacts available.";return}items.forEach(item=>{const tr=row([item.run_id||"",item.artifact_name||"",item.size_bytes!=null?String(item.size_bytes):"",item.modified_at||""]);tr.style.cursor="pointer";tr.addEventListener("click",()=>{void loadArtifact(item.run_id,item.artifact_name);void loadTrace(item.run_id,item.artifact_name)});journalList.appendChild(tr)});const first=items[0];void loadArtifact(first.run_id,first.artifact_name);void loadTrace(first.run_id,first.artifact_name);journalStatus.textContent=`Loaded ${items.length} of ${payload.total} artifacts.`}catch(error){journalStatus.textContent=`Failed to load journal artifacts: ${error.message}`;artifactStatus.textContent="Artifact content unavailable.";traceStatus.textContent="Decision trace unavailable."}}
    const orderKey=item=>`${item.run_id}::${item.order_id}`,compare=(a,b)=>String(a.event_timestamp||"").localeCompare(String(b.event_timestamp||""))||Number(a.event_sequence||0)-Number(b.event_sequence||0);
    function renderTimeline(group){lifeTimeline.innerHTML="";if(!group){const li=document.createElement("li");li.textContent="No lifecycle events available.";lifeTimeline.appendChild(li);lifeSelected.textContent="No order selected.";return}lifeSelected.textContent=`Selected order ${group.order_id} (run ${group.run_id}) with ${group.events.length} events.`;group.events.forEach(event=>{const li=document.createElement("li"),top=document.createElement("div"),time=document.createElement("span"),state=document.createElement("span"),detail=document.createElement("div");top.className="top";state.className="state";time.textContent=event.event_timestamp||"";state.textContent=event.state||"";top.append(time,state);detail.style.marginTop=".35rem";detail.style.color="var(--muted)";detail.style.fontSize=".82rem";detail.textContent=`sequence=${event.event_sequence} symbol=${event.symbol} strategy=${event.strategy}`;li.append(top,detail);lifeTimeline.appendChild(li)})}
    async function loadLifecycle(){lifeStatus.textContent="Loading order lifecycle events from /execution/orders...";try{const response=await fetch("/execution/orders?limit=200&offset=0");if(!response.ok)throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);const payload=await response.json(),items=Array.isArray(payload.items)?payload.items:[];if(!items.length){lifeStatus.textContent="No order lifecycle events found.";lifeOrders.innerHTML="";renderTimeline(null);return}const grouped=new Map();items.forEach(item=>{const key=orderKey(item);if(!grouped.has(key))grouped.set(key,{key,run_id:item.run_id||"",order_id:item.order_id||"",symbol:item.symbol||"",strategy:item.strategy||"",events:[]});grouped.get(key).events.push(item)});const groups=Array.from(grouped.values());groups.forEach(g=>g.events.sort(compare));groups.sort((a,b)=>compare(b.events[b.events.length-1],a.events[a.events.length-1]));lifeOrders.innerHTML="";groups.forEach(group=>{const last=group.events[group.events.length-1]||{},tr=row([group.run_id,group.order_id,group.symbol,group.strategy,String(group.events.length),last.state||""]);tr.style.cursor="pointer";tr.addEventListener("click",()=>{selectedKey=group.key;renderTimeline(group)});lifeOrders.appendChild(tr)});const selected=groups.find(g=>g.key===selectedKey)||groups[0];selectedKey=selected.key;renderTimeline(selected);lifeStatus.textContent=`Loaded ${items.length} events across ${groups.length} orders.`}catch(error){lifeStatus.textContent=`Failed to load trade lifecycle events: ${error.message}`;lifeOrders.innerHTML="";renderTimeline(null)}}
    void Promise.all([loadRuntimeState(),loadStrategies(),loadSignals(),loadAlerts(),loadWatchlists(),loadJournal(),loadLifecycle()]);setInterval(()=>{void loadLifecycle();void loadRuntimeState();void loadAlerts()},15000);
  </script>
  <script>
    (function () {
      const backtestHeaders = {"X-Cilly-Role": "read_only"};
      const backtestStatus = document.getElementById("backtest-status");
      const backtestError = document.getElementById("backtest-error");
      const backtestEmpty = document.getElementById("backtest-empty");
      const backtestList = document.getElementById("backtest-artifact-list");
      const backtestBoundaryStatus = document.getElementById("backtest-boundary-status");
      const backtestArtifactStatus = document.getElementById("backtest-artifact-content-status");
      const backtestArtifactPreview = document.getElementById("backtest-artifact-content-preview");
      const backtestForm = document.getElementById("backtest-entry-read-form");
      const backtestRunIdFilter = document.getElementById("backtest-run-id-filter");

      const backtestRow = (cells) => {
        const tr = document.createElement("tr");
        cells.forEach((value) => {
          const td = document.createElement("td");
          td.textContent = value;
          tr.appendChild(td);
        });
        return tr;
      };

      const showBacktestError = (message) => {
        backtestError.hidden = !message;
        backtestError.textContent = message || "";
      };

      const boundarySummary = (boundary) => {
        if (!boundary || typeof boundary !== "object") {
          return "Boundary metadata unavailable.";
        }
        const technical = boundary.technical_availability_statement || "Technical availability not declared.";
        const trader = boundary.trader_validation_statement || "Trader validation boundary not declared.";
        const readiness = boundary.operational_readiness_statement || "Operational readiness boundary not declared.";
        return `${technical} ${trader} ${readiness}`;
      };

      const renderBacktestArtifacts = (payload) => {
        backtestList.innerHTML = "";
        const items = Array.isArray(payload.items) ? payload.items : [];
        backtestBoundaryStatus.textContent = boundarySummary(payload.boundary);
        backtestArtifactPreview.textContent = "";
        backtestArtifactStatus.textContent = "Select a backtest artifact to preview content.";
        if (!items.length) {
          backtestEmpty.hidden = false;
          return;
        }

        backtestEmpty.hidden = true;
        items.forEach((item) => {
          const tr = backtestRow([
            item.run_id || "",
            item.artifact_name || "",
            item.size_bytes != null ? String(item.size_bytes) : "",
            item.modified_at || "",
          ]);
          tr.style.cursor = "pointer";
          tr.addEventListener("click", () => {
            void loadBacktestArtifactContent(item.run_id, item.artifact_name);
          });
          backtestList.appendChild(tr);
        });
      };

      async function loadBacktestArtifactContent(runId, artifactName) {
        backtestArtifactStatus.textContent = `Loading ${artifactName}...`;
        backtestArtifactPreview.textContent = "";
        try {
          const response = await fetch(
            `/backtest/artifacts/${encodeURIComponent(runId)}/${encodeURIComponent(artifactName)}`,
            {headers: backtestHeaders},
          );
          if (!response.ok) {
            let detail = `HTTP ${response.status}`;
            try {
              const errorPayload = await response.json();
              if (errorPayload && errorPayload.detail) {
                detail = typeof errorPayload.detail === "string"
                  ? errorPayload.detail
                  : JSON.stringify(errorPayload.detail);
              }
            } catch (_) {}
            throw new Error(detail);
          }
          const payload = await response.json();
          const content = payload.content_type === "json"
            ? JSON.stringify(payload.content, null, 2)
            : String(payload.content || "");
          backtestArtifactPreview.textContent = content;
          backtestArtifactStatus.textContent = `Loaded ${payload.artifact_name} for run ${payload.run_id}.`;
          backtestBoundaryStatus.textContent = boundarySummary(payload.boundary);
        } catch (error) {
          backtestArtifactStatus.textContent = `Failed to load backtest artifact content: ${error.message}`;
        }
      }

      async function loadBacktestArtifacts() {
        showBacktestError("");
        const runId = backtestRunIdFilter.value.trim();
        backtestStatus.textContent = "Loading bounded backtest artifacts from /backtest/artifacts...";
        const query = runId ? `?run_id=${encodeURIComponent(runId)}` : "";
        try {
          const response = await fetch(`/backtest/artifacts${query}`, {headers: backtestHeaders});
          if (!response.ok) {
            let detail = `HTTP ${response.status}`;
            try {
              const errorPayload = await response.json();
              if (errorPayload && errorPayload.detail) {
                detail = typeof errorPayload.detail === "string"
                  ? errorPayload.detail
                  : JSON.stringify(errorPayload.detail);
              }
            } catch (_) {}
            throw new Error(detail);
          }
          const payload = await response.json();
          renderBacktestArtifacts(payload);
          backtestStatus.textContent = `Loaded ${payload.total} governed backtest artifacts from /backtest/artifacts.`;
        } catch (error) {
          renderBacktestArtifacts({items: [], boundary: null});
          showBacktestError(`Failed to load bounded backtest artifacts: ${error.message}`);
          backtestStatus.textContent = "Backtest artifact load failed.";
        }
      }

      backtestForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();
        void loadBacktestArtifacts();
      });

      void loadBacktestArtifacts();
    })();
  </script>
</body>
</html>
===== END FILE: src/ui/index.html =====

===== BEGIN FILE: docs/operations/ui/phase-23-research-dashboard-contract.md =====
# Phase 23 /ui Website-Facing Workflow Consolidation Contract

## Purpose
Define the bounded website-facing information architecture (IA) contract after Option 2 ratification:
one canonical `/ui` workflow shell with explicit non-live boundaries.

## Canonical Surface
- Surface name: `Canonical /ui Workflow Shell`
- Runtime entrypoint: `/ui`
- Runtime artifact: `src/ui/index.html`
- Runtime mount: `src/api/main.py`
- Non-authoritative parallel surface: `frontend/` remains non-authoritative unless later promoted by governance

`/ui` is the only canonical website-facing workflow entrypoint in this contract.

## Primary Navigation Contract
The canonical `/ui` shell owns one bounded workflow navigation contract:

1. `Workflow: Run Analysis` (`#analysis-entry`)
2. `Workflow: Manage Watchlists` (`#watchlist-workflow`)
3. `Workflow: Review Ranked Watchlist Results` (`#watchlist-results`)
4. `Workflow: Inspect Backtest Artifacts` (`#backtest-entry`)
5. `Workflow: Inspect Runtime Data` (`#runtime-data`)
6. `Workflow: Review Run Evidence` (`#run-evidence`)

These navigation labels and anchors are the website-facing IA ownership markers for this issue slice.

## Explicit Non-Live Boundary
IA consolidation in `/ui` does not introduce:
- live trading
- broker execution
- trader validation
- operational-readiness claims
- production-readiness claims
- technical backtest availability as a substitute for trader validation or readiness evidence

`No Phase 39 or Phase 40 features` wording in the `/ui` shell remains an explicit non-inference marker.

## Bounded Workflow Ownership
The `/ui` shell consolidates bounded website-facing workflow entrypoints through existing backend routes:
- `POST /analysis/run`
- `GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /watchlists`
- `POST /watchlists/{watchlist_id}/execute`
- `GET /system/state`
- `GET /strategies`
- `GET /signals`
- `GET /backtest/artifacts`
- `GET /backtest/artifacts/{run_id}/{artifact_name}`
- `GET /alerts/history`
- `GET /journal/artifacts`
- `GET /journal/decision-trace`
- `GET /execution/orders`

Consolidation of IA does not widen route scope and does not imply trader validation or operational readiness.

## Minimum Evidence Set
1. Bounded contract documentation  
   This file defines canonical `/ui` ownership, navigation contract, and explicit non-live boundary.
2. Runtime/UI implementation artifact  
   `src/ui/index.html` includes canonical shell and navigation markers:
   - `id="ui-primary-navigation-contract"`
   - `id="ui-workflow-boundary-marker"`
3. Verification artifact  
   - `src/api/test_research_dashboard_surface.py`
   - `src/api/test_operator_workbench_surface.py`
   - `tests/test_ui_runtime_browser_flow.py`
   - `tests/test_phase23_research_dashboard_contract.py`

## Verification Procedure
1. Open `/ui`.
2. Confirm canonical marker text: `Bounded Website-Facing Workflow Shell`.
3. Confirm navigation contract marker `id="ui-primary-navigation-contract"` is present.
4. Confirm non-live marker `id="ui-workflow-boundary-marker"` is present.
5. Confirm non-live boundary text includes no live trading, no broker execution controls, and no operational-readiness inference.
6. Run `pytest src/api/test_research_dashboard_surface.py src/api/test_operator_workbench_surface.py tests/test_ui_runtime_browser_flow.py tests/test_phase23_research_dashboard_contract.py`.

## OPS-P56 and #914 Non-Interference
This IA consolidation contract does not redefine operational run logging and does not replace OPS-P56 issue #914.

`OPS-P56: Start bounded staged paper-trading runbook and evidence log #914` remains the single operational run log issue.
===== END FILE: docs/operations/ui/phase-23-research-dashboard-contract.md =====

===== BEGIN FILE: tests/test_api_backtest_entry_read.py =====
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import shutil
import uuid
from pathlib import Path

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

import api.main as api_main

READ_ONLY_HEADERS = {api_main.ROLE_HEADER_NAME: "read_only"}


def _make_isolated_tmp_path() -> Path:
    base_dir = Path.cwd() / "tests" / "pytest_tmp"
    base_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path = base_dir / f"backtest-entry-read-{uuid.uuid4().hex}"
    path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=False)
    return path


def _write_json_artifact(root: Path, run_id: str, artifact_name: str, payload: object) -> None:
    run_dir = root / run_id
    run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    (run_dir / artifact_name).write_text(json.dumps(payload), encoding="utf-8")


def _write_text_artifact(root: Path, run_id: str, artifact_name: str, payload: str) -> None:
    run_dir = root / run_id
    run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    (run_dir / artifact_name).write_text(payload, encoding="utf-8")


def test_backtest_entry_read_route_exposes_bounded_non_live_contract(
    monkeypatch,
) -> None:
    tmp_path = _make_isolated_tmp_path()
    try:
        artifacts_root = tmp_path / "runs" / "phase6"
        _write_json_artifact(
            artifacts_root,
            run_id="bt-run-1",
            artifact_name="backtest-result.json",
            payload={"run": {"run_id": "bt-run-1"}, "summary": {"total_trades": 3}},
        )
        _write_json_artifact(
            artifacts_root,
            run_id="bt-run-1",
            artifact_name="audit.json",
            payload={"trace_id": "ignored"},
        )

        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "start_engine_runtime", lambda: "running")
        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "JOURNAL_ARTIFACTS_ROOT", artifacts_root)

        with TestClient(api_main.app) as client:
            response = client.get("/backtest/artifacts", headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS)
            openapi = client.get("/openapi.json").json()

        assert response.status_code == 200
        payload = response.json()
        assert payload["workflow_id"] == "ui_bounded_backtest_entry_read"
        assert payload["boundary"]["mode"] == "non_live_backtest_read_only"
        assert "technical availability" in payload["boundary"]["technical_availability_statement"]
        assert "not trader validation" in payload["boundary"]["trader_validation_statement"]
        assert "not operational readiness" in payload["boundary"]["operational_readiness_statement"]
        assert payload["total"] == 1
        assert payload["items"][0]["run_id"] == "bt-run-1"
        assert payload["items"][0]["artifact_name"] == "backtest-result.json"
        assert "/backtest/artifacts" in openapi["paths"]
        assert "/backtest/artifacts/{run_id}/{artifact_name}" in openapi["paths"]
    finally:
        shutil.rmtree(tmp_path, ignore_errors=True)


def test_backtest_entry_read_route_handles_empty_filter_content_and_failure(
    monkeypatch,
) -> None:
    tmp_path = _make_isolated_tmp_path()
    try:
        artifacts_root = tmp_path / "runs" / "phase6"
        artifacts_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        _write_json_artifact(
            artifacts_root,
            run_id="bt-run-2",
            artifact_name="metrics-result.json",
            payload={"metrics": {"returns": {"total_return": 0.12}}},
        )
        _write_text_artifact(
            artifacts_root,
            run_id="bt-run-2",
            artifact_name="backtest-result.sha256",
            payload="abc123\n",
        )
        _write_json_artifact(
            artifacts_root,
            run_id="bt-run-2",
            artifact_name="audit.json",
            payload={"trace_id": "ignored"},
        )

        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "start_engine_runtime", lambda: "running")
        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "JOURNAL_ARTIFACTS_ROOT", artifacts_root)

        with TestClient(api_main.app) as client:
            empty = client.get(
                "/backtest/artifacts",
                headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS,
                params={"run_id": "does-not-exist"},
            )
            filtered = client.get(
                "/backtest/artifacts",
                headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS,
                params={"run_id": "bt-run-2"},
            )
            content = client.get(
                "/backtest/artifacts/bt-run-2/metrics-result.json",
                headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS,
            )
            hash_content = client.get(
                "/backtest/artifacts/bt-run-2/backtest-result.sha256",
                headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS,
            )
            invalid_name = client.get(
                "/backtest/artifacts/bt-run-2/audit.json",
                headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS,
            )
            unauthorized = client.get("/backtest/artifacts")

        assert empty.status_code == 200
        assert empty.json()["items"] == []
        assert empty.json()["total"] == 0

        assert filtered.status_code == 200
        filtered_payload = filtered.json()
        assert filtered_payload["total"] == 2
        assert {item["artifact_name"] for item in filtered_payload["items"]} == {
            "metrics-result.json",
            "backtest-result.sha256",
        }

        assert content.status_code == 200
        content_payload = content.json()
        assert content_payload["artifact_name"] == "metrics-result.json"
        assert content_payload["content_type"] == "json"
        assert content_payload["content"]["metrics"]["returns"]["total_return"] == 0.12

        assert hash_content.status_code == 200
        hash_payload = hash_content.json()
        assert hash_payload["artifact_name"] == "backtest-result.sha256"
        assert hash_payload["content_type"] == "text"
        assert hash_payload["content"] == "abc123\n"

        assert invalid_name.status_code == 404
        assert invalid_name.json() == {"detail": "backtest_artifact_not_found"}

        assert unauthorized.status_code == 401
        assert unauthorized.json() == {"detail": "unauthorized"}
    finally:
        shutil.rmtree(tmp_path, ignore_errors=True)
===== END FILE: tests/test_api_backtest_entry_read.py =====

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path


REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]

DOCS_INDEX = "docs/index.md"
UI_FILE = "src/ui/index.html"
API_MAIN_FILE = "src/api/main.py"


def _read(relative_path: str) -> str:
    return (REPO_ROOT / relative_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8")


def test_phase23_contract_defines_single_canonical_ui_workflow_shell() -> None:

===== BEGIN FILE: tests/test_ui_runtime_browser_flow.py =====
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import shutil
import sqlite3
import uuid
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

import api.main as api_main
from cilly_trading.repositories.analysis_runs_sqlite import SqliteAnalysisRunRepository
from cilly_trading.repositories.signals_sqlite import SqliteSignalRepository
from cilly_trading.repositories.watchlists_sqlite import SqliteWatchlistRepository

OPERATOR_HEADERS = {api_main.ROLE_HEADER_NAME: "operator"}
READ_ONLY_HEADERS = {api_main.ROLE_HEADER_NAME: "read_only"}


class _RuntimeControllerStub:
    def __init__(self, state: str) -> None:
        self.state = state


def _make_signal_repo(tmp_path: Path) -> SqliteSignalRepository:
    return SqliteSignalRepository(db_path=tmp_path / "signals.db")


def _make_analysis_repo(tmp_path: Path) -> SqliteAnalysisRunRepository:
    return SqliteAnalysisRunRepository(db_path=tmp_path / "analysis.db")


def _make_watchlist_repo(tmp_path: Path) -> SqliteWatchlistRepository:
    return SqliteWatchlistRepository(db_path=tmp_path / "watchlists.db")


def _make_isolated_sqlite_tmp_path() -> Path:
    path = Path.cwd() / f"ui-runtime-browser-flow-{uuid.uuid4().hex}"
    path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=False)
    return path


def _insert_ingestion_run(
    db_path: Path,
    ingestion_run_id: str,
    *,
    symbols: list[str],
    timeframe: str = "D1",
) -> None:
    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
    conn.execute(
        """
        INSERT INTO ingestion_runs (
            ingestion_run_id,
            created_at,
            source,
            symbols_json,
            timeframe,
            fingerprint_hash
        )
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);
        """,
        (
            ingestion_run_id,
            datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            "test",
            json.dumps(symbols),
            timeframe,
            None,
        ),
    )
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()


def _insert_snapshot_rows(
    db_path: Path,
    ingestion_run_id: str,
    symbol: str,
    timeframe: str,
    rows: list[tuple[int, float, float, float, float, float]],
) -> None:
    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
    conn.executemany(
        """
        INSERT INTO ohlcv_snapshots (
            ingestion_run_id,
            symbol,
            timeframe,
            ts,
            open,
            high,
            low,
            close,
            volume
        )
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);
        """,
        [
            (
                ingestion_run_id,
                symbol,
                timeframe,
                ts,
                open_,
                high,
                low,
                close,
                volume,
            )
            for ts, open_, high, low, close, volume in rows
        ],
    )
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()


class _ScoreFromCloseStrategy:
    name = "WATCHLIST_FAKE"

    def generate_signals(self, df: Any, config: dict[str, Any]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
        last_row = df.iloc[-1]
        return [
            {
                "score": float(last_row["volume"]),
                "signal_strength": float(last_row["close"]),
                "stage": "setup",
            }
        ]


def test_ui_browser_flow_uses_existing_runtime_api_surface(monkeypatch) -> None:
    tmp_path = _make_isolated_sqlite_tmp_path()
    try:
        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "start_engine_runtime", lambda: "running")
        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "get_runtime_controller", lambda: _RuntimeControllerStub("running"))
        signal_repo = _make_signal_repo(tmp_path)
        analysis_repo = _make_analysis_repo(tmp_path)
        watchlist_repo = _make_watchlist_repo(tmp_path)

        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "signal_repo", signal_repo)
        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "analysis_run_repo", analysis_repo)
        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "watchlist_repo", watchlist_repo)
        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "_require_engine_runtime_running", lambda: None)
        monkeypatch.setattr(api_main, "create_registered_strategies", lambda: [_ScoreFromCloseStrategy()])

        ingestion_run_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        _insert_ingestion_run(
            tmp_path / "analysis.db",
            ingestion_run_id,
            symbols=["AAPL", "MSFT", "NVDA"],
        )
        _insert_snapshot_rows(
            tmp_path / "analysis.db",
            ingestion_run_id,
            "AAPL",
            "D1",
            [
                (1735689600000, 101.0, 102.0, 100.0, 101.0, 1000.0),
                (1735776000000, 100.0, 101.0, 90.0, 91.0, 1000.0),
                (1735862400000, 90.0, 91.0, 80.0, 81.0, 1000.0),
            ],
        )
        _insert_snapshot_rows(
            tmp_path / "analysis.db",
            ingestion_run_id,
            "MSFT",
            "D1",
            [
                (1735689600000, 201.0, 202.0, 200.0, 201.0, 70.0),
                (1735776000000, 205.0, 206.0, 204.0, 205.0, 72.0),
            ],
        )
        _insert_snapshot_rows(
            tmp_path / "analysis.db",
            ingestion_run_id,
            "NVDA",
            "D1",
            [
                (1735689600000, 301.0, 302.0, 300.0, 301.0, 95.0),
                (1735776000000, 306.0, 307.0, 305.0, 306.0, 96.0),
            ],
        )

        monkeypatch.setattr(
            api_main,
            "get_system_state_payload",
            lambda: {
                "schema_version": "v1",
                "status": "running",
                    "runtime": {
                        "schema_version": "v1",
                        "runtime_id": "runtime-ui-flow",
                        "mode": "running",
                        "timestamps": {
                            "started_at": "2025-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
                            "updated_at": "2025-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
                        },
                        "ownership": {"owner_tag": "engine"},
                        "extensions": [],
                    },
                "metadata": {
                    "read_only": True,
                    "source": "engine_control_plane",
                },
            },
        )

        def _fail_yahoo(*args, **kwargs):
            raise AssertionError("yfinance should not be called")

        def _fail_binance(*args, **kwargs):
            raise AssertionError("ccxt should not be called")

        monkeypatch.setattr("cilly_trading.engine.data._load_stock_yahoo", _fail_yahoo)
        monkeypatch.setattr("cilly_trading.engine.data._load_crypto_binance", _fail_binance)

        with TestClient(api_main.app) as client:
            ui_response = client.get("/ui")
            assert ui_response.status_code == 200
            assert "Bounded Website-Facing Workflow Shell" in ui_response.text
            assert "single canonical website-facing workflow entrypoint" in ui_response.text
            assert 'id="ui-primary-navigation-contract"' in ui_response.text
            assert 'id="ui-workflow-boundary-marker"' in ui_response.text
            assert "No live trading" in ui_response.text
            assert "broker execution controls" in ui_response.text
            assert "operational-readiness inference" in ui_response.text
            assert "/system/state" in ui_response.text
            assert 'roleHeaderName="X-Cilly-Role"' in ui_response.text
            assert 'readOnlyHeaders={[roleHeaderName]:"read_only"}' in ui_response.text
            assert 'operatorHeaders={[roleHeaderName]:"operator"}' in ui_response.text
            assert "/analysis/run" in ui_response.text
            assert "/alerts/history" in ui_response.text
            assert 'id="alert-status"' in ui_response.text
            assert 'id="alert-list"' in ui_response.text
            assert "No Phase 39 or Phase 40 features" in ui_response.text
            assert 'id="runtime-chart-panel"' not in ui_response.text
            assert "phase39-visual-analysis" not in ui_response.text
            assert "/signals?limit=20&sort=created_at_desc" in ui_response.text
            assert "/watchlists" in ui_response.text
            assert "/watchlists/{watchlist_id}" in ui_response.text
            assert "/watchlists/{watchlist_id}/execute" in ui_response.text
            assert 'id="watchlist-form"' in ui_response.text
            assert 'id="watchlist-ranked-result-list"' in ui_response.text
            assert "Workflow: Inspect Backtest Artifacts" in ui_response.text
            assert "Backtest Entry/Read Panel" in ui_response.text
            assert 'id="backtest-entry-read-form"' in ui_response.text
            assert 'id="backtest-artifact-list"' in ui_response.text
            assert "/backtest/artifacts" in ui_response.text
            assert "/backtest/artifacts/{run_id}/{artifact_name}" in ui_response.text
            assert "Technical availability of bounded backtest artifacts is not trader validation." in ui_response.text
            assert "does not establish operational readiness or live execution readiness." in ui_response.text

            state_response = client.get("/system/state", headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS)
            assert state_response.status_code == 200
            assert state_response.json()["status"] == "running"

            analysis_response = client.post(
                "/analysis/run",
                headers=OPERATOR_HEADERS,
                json={
                    "ingestion_run_id": ingestion_run_id,
                    "symbol": "AAPL",
                    "strategy": "RSI2",
                    "market_type": "stock",
                    "lookback_days": 200,
                },
            )
            assert analysis_response.status_code == 200
            analysis_payload = analysis_response.json()
            assert analysis_payload["analysis_run_id"]
            assert analysis_payload["signals"]

            signals_response = client.get(
                "/signals",
                headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS,
                params={
                    "ingestion_run_id": ingestion_run_id,
                    "symbol": "AAPL",
                    "sort": "created_at_desc",
                },
            )
            assert signals_response.status_code == 200
            signals_payload = signals_response.json()
            assert signals_payload["total"] >= 1
            assert any(item["symbol"] == "AAPL" for item in signals_payload["items"])

            create_watchlist_response = client.post(
                "/watchlists",
                headers=OPERATOR_HEADERS,
                json={
                    "watchlist_id": "phase37-tech",
                    "name": "Phase 37 Tech",
                    "symbols": ["MSFT", "NVDA"],
                },
            )
            assert create_watchlist_response.status_code == 200
            assert create_watchlist_response.json()["watchlist_id"] == "phase37-tech"

            list_watchlists_response = client.get("/watchlists", headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS)
            assert list_watchlists_response.status_code == 200
            assert list_watchlists_response.json()["total"] == 1

            update_watchlist_response = client.put(
                "/watchlists/phase37-tech",
                headers=OPERATOR_HEADERS,
                json={
                    "name": "Phase 37 Ranked Tech",
                    "symbols": ["NVDA", "MSFT"],
                },
            )
            assert update_watchlist_response.status_code == 200
            assert update_watchlist_response.json()["name"] == "Phase 37 Ranked Tech"

            read_watchlist_response = client.get(
                "/watchlists/phase37-tech",
                headers=READ_ONLY_HEADERS,
            )
            assert read_watchlist_response.status_code == 200
            assert read_watchlist_response.json()["symbols"] == ["NVDA", "MSFT"]

            execute_watchlist_response = client.post(
                "/watchlists/phase37-tech/execute",
                headers=OPERATOR_HEADERS,
                json={
                    "ingestion_run_id": ingestion_run_id,
                    "market_type": "stock",
                    "lookback_days": 200,
                    "min_score": 60.0,
                },
            )
            assert execute_watchlist_response.status_code == 200
            execute_payload = execute_watchlist_response.json()
            assert execute_payload["watchlist_id"] == "phase37-tech"
            assert execute_payload["watchlist_name"] == "Phase 37 Ranked Tech"
            assert [item["symbol"] for item in execute_payload["ranked_results"]] == ["NVDA", "MSFT"]
            assert [item["rank"] for item in execute_payload["ranked_results"]] == [1, 2]
            assert execute_payload["failures"] == []

            delete_watchlist_response = client.delete(
                "/watchlists/phase37-tech",
                headers=OPERATOR_HEADERS,
            )
            assert delete_watchlist_response.status_code == 200
            assert delete_watchlist_response.json() == {
                "watchlist_id": "phase37-tech",
                "deleted": True,
            }
    finally:
        shutil.rmtree(tmp_path, ignore_errors=True)
